summary: Phase 3 testing complete: Claude AI PDF Catalog Importer. All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including PDF Import page with import history sidebar, detail view with extracted products, approve/edit/delete actions, and Approve All button.
passed_tests: GET /api/admin/imports returns list of imports with status and counts
GET /api/admin/imports/:id returns full import detail with extracted products
POST /api/admin/imports/:id/approve with approve_ids approves specific products
All 6 admin endpoints accessible (stats, pipeline, leads, analytics, products, imports)
POST /api/leads still creates leads with scoring
frontend_tests_passed: Admin sidebar has 6 nav items: Dashboard, Pipeline, Leads, Analytics, Products, PDF Import
PDF Import page loads at /admin/imports
Upload PDF button present
Import History sidebar shows 2 imports (test_small.pdf, test_sales_guide.pdf)
Import detail view shows filename, product count, approved count
test_small.pdf shows 3 products extracted, 3 approved (all Published)
test_sales_guide.pdf shows 16 products extracted, 1 approved
Approve All & Publish button present for imports with unapproved products
Extracted products show: product_name, division, category, SKU
Expand/collapse functionality works on product rows
Expanded product shows: description, material, specifications, SEO title, meta description
Individual approve button (checkmark) present on unapproved products
Edit button (pencil) present on unapproved products
Delete button (trash) present on unapproved products
Edit form opens with fields: Product Name, SKU, Division, Category, Description, Material
Edit form has Save and Cancel buttons
Published badge shown on approved products
Pipeline page still loads correctly
Analytics page still loads correctly
Products page still loads with table
Dashboard page still loads correctly
Logout redirects to login page
Homepage loads with hero section and 8 divisions
Mega menu shows all 8 divisions with categories
Products page loads with product cards
Contact page loads
Footer shows regulatory info (MD-42, GST)
critical_code_review_comments: Claude AI integration is REAL (not mocked) using Emergent LLM key - working correctly
PDF text extraction using pdfplumber works correctly
Claude generates structured JSON product data + SEO content (description, meta title, meta description)
All Phase 3 APIs working correctly with proper authentication
Import approval correctly publishes products to catalog
Edit functionality correctly updates extracted product fields
All data-testid attributes present for UI testing
seed_data_creation: Two PDF imports exist: test_small.pdf (3/3 approved) and test_sales_guide.pdf (1/16 approved, 15 products ready for approval testing)

features_verified.pdf_upload: POST /api/admin/import/pdf uploads PDF and starts extraction (returns import_id, status=processing)
features_verified.import_list: GET /api/admin/imports lists all imports with status and counts
features_verified.import_detail: GET /api/admin/imports/:id returns full import detail with extracted products
features_verified.approve_all: POST /api/admin/imports/:id/approve publishes all unapproved products to catalog
features_verified.approve_single: POST /api/admin/imports/:id/approve with approve_ids approves specific products
features_verified.edit_product: PUT /api/admin/imports/:id/product/:temp_id edits extracted product before approval
features_verified.admin_sidebar: 6 nav items: Dashboard, Pipeline, Leads, Analytics, Products, PDF Import
features_verified.claude_ai_extraction: REAL Claude AI extracts product data (name, SKU, division, category, specs, material) from PDF text
features_verified.seo_generation: REAL Claude AI generates SEO-optimized descriptions and meta tags
features_verified.previous_phases: Phase 1+2 features still work (homepage, products, pipeline, analytics, leads)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 complete. Claude AI PDF Catalog Importer fully functional. Two imports exist: test_small.pdf (3/3 approved) and test_sales_guide.pdf (1/16 approved). 15 products from sales_guide.pdf ready for approval testing. Claude AI integration is REAL (not mocked). All 6 admin nav items working. Previous Phase 1+2 features verified working.
